cause_analysis.narrative: B.O.S.S.Y. Braids, LLC churned on 2026-02-04 after 110 days with Zoca. Classification: ghost churn. Zero communication on record in the comms window before churn — the customer was invisible long before the formal cancellation.
recommendations: [Onboarding] Zero touchpoints in the comms window means the customer was effectively unowned. Audit onboarding handoff — how did this customer slip through the daily/weekly check routines?
[Health score] Define a minimum-contact SLA (e.g., ≥1 touchpoint every 14 days) and alert on violations.
